features: DUAL OUTPUT- Our Daewoo 10000MAH power bank has twin USB-A ports with 2.0A output, meaning you can fast charge two devices simultaniously.
SMART PROTECTION- With over-heat, over-current, and over-charging protection, charging will be automatically stopped when battery is full
COMPACT DESIGN- A smooth and soft scratch resistant cover with LED light indicators and on/off switch to ensure your devices are charged up at all times.
PREMIUM QUALITY- Made of the highest quality heat-resistant aluminium, with reinforced anti-scratch coating designed to last.
WARNING: THIS CABLE IS RATED 2.0A, TO BE USED ONLY WITH A COMPATIBLE ADAPTOR.
